raw_consumer_statement:
We disputed several charges made between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX by someone who stole our AAdvantage Citicard number and account information. The charges are clearly the result of a scam nearly 100 purchases, each for about {$90.00}, made in Texas at a few stores ( Note : we have never been to Texas ). We also asked Citibank to investigate unauthorized access to our account, as a phone number and email address that do not belong to us were added. We first noticed this added information in early XXXX and have a screenshot of the email, along with a Texas address in the same area where the fraudulent purchases were made. 

The bank took the time to review our claims but ultimately ruled against us. We had to call and speak with multiple representatives to request a re-evaluation of the claims, only to find that they were rejected once again.
